description*.en: "Number of Particles", also known as the particle number, of a thermodynamic system, conventionally indicated with the letter N, is the number of constituent particles in that system.

title: NumberOfParticles
description: "Number of Particles", also known as the particle number, of a thermodynamic system, conventionally indicated with the letter N, is the number of constituent particles in that system.
